name: TOP_ASSIGNEES_BY_FUNCTION_FAMILY_COUNT
description: Top assignees by functional category family count. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (f:Functional_of_Target {name: $functional_of_target})<-[:FUNCTIONED_AS]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)<-[:HAS_PATENT]-(fam:Family)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT fam) AS family_count
ORDER BY family_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: Within target-pair combinations related to the Apoptosis_Induction_Target category, which companies filed the most patent families? Please provide the top 10.
Within target-pair combinations related to the Ion_Channel_Immune_Modulator_Target category, which companies filed the most patent families? Please provide the top 10.
Within target-pair combinations related to the Immune_Cell_Subset_Marker_Target category, which companies filed the most patent families? Please provide the top 10.
